title: brodiaea californica subsp. leptandra
intro: Brodiaea californica subsp. leptandra is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant, specifically a type of wild onion or brodiaea native to California. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Brodiaea californica subsp. leptandra can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, although its use should be approached with caution due to limited research and potential side effects.
